---
title: "BIO/CHEM 806 – GitHub Pages Example"
format: html
---

# Welcome

This is my GitHub Pages site for BIO/CHEM 806.

This page serves as a landing page for my course analyses.

---

# Project Description

In this repository, I explore ecological datasets using reproducible workflows in R and Quarto.  
Each analysis below is rendered as an HTML document and linked here for easy access.

---

# Analyses

- [Introduction to Quarto](intro-to-qmd.html)
- [Data Cleaning](data-cleaning.html)

---

# Notes

- All files are rendered using Quarto
- Analyses are reproducible and version-controlled via GitHub
